name: Ooh!Media Limited
analysis: OML has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.4050. Trade idea: entry A$1.4800, stop A$1.1880, target A$2.3560 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
